caption: A woman with dark hair and glasses is speaking against a plain black background. She is wearing a light green garment with floral embroidery along the neckline and a dark beaded necklace. A small lapel microphone is clipped to the front of her clothing. Throughout the sequence, she gestures with both hands raised in front of her chest to emphasize her points. Her facial expression remains focused as her mouth moves in a speaking motion. In the bottom left corner of the frames, a circular logo appears alongside the text "NPTEL". As the sequence progresses, the woman shifts her gaze slightly and adjusts her hand positions, moving from an open-palmed gesture to a more pointed motion with her right hand. The lighting is consistent, highlighting her face and upper body while the background remains entirely dark.
